ops.text:
COMPLETION RETURN (2026-07-19, completion lane). All 8 arm×replicate passes now COMPLETE: 2 control (prior lane) + 6 perturbation (this lane: length/position/style ×2). Each pass judged=80 failed=0 on its own fresh APFS clone (E8 honored — suspect pre-existing clone_length_r1.db was discarded and recreated fresh; 6 fresh perturbation clones present). Harness matched the pre-registration exactly: perturbations applied at VOTE TIME via e16lib.build_prompt (length = +6092 chars neutral [session-note] filler; position = REVERSED_JUDGE_PROMPT bullet reorder + flipped summary sentence, delta 0; style = opus paraphrase substituted for text). Style paraphrases were already baked into sample.jsonl by the prior lane (0 empty, 10/10 fidelity spot-check on record) — no fresh authoring needed. No-spend smoke confirmed resolved_model('medium')=sonnet and correct per-arm prompt deltas before voting. analyze.py reproduced the recovered control baseline EXACTLY (0.075/0.125), confirming the instrument.

CONTROL baseline (test-retest noise floor, N=80): steering flip 0.075 ± 0.029 ; category flip 0.125 ± 0.037.

PER-FACTOR FLIP vs CONTROL (matched-replicate, 2N obs):
  factor   | steer_flip  Δsteer | cat_flip  Δcat  | registered >5pp
  length   |   0.050    -0.025  |  0.119   -0.006 | none  (below control on both)
  position |   0.050    -0.025  |  0.150   +0.025 | none
  style    |   0.087    +0.013  |  0.206   +0.081 | FLAG (category only)

READING (a) — PRE-REGISTERED >5pp rule (Δflip > 0.05 on binary OR 11-way category):
  FLAGGED = [style], on the CATEGORY metric only (Δcat +8.1pp). length & position NOT flagged; both sit AT OR BELOW the control noise floor on the pipeline-consequential binary is_steering (Δsteer −2.5pp each). No factor flips binary is_steering above control.

READING (b) — POWER-AWARE / bootstrap-CI (N_boot=5000, paired over rows; a factor is CI-reliable only if its delta-vs-control 95% CI excludes 0):
  FLAGGED = NONE. delta 95% CIs all straddle 0: length steer [−0.069,+0.012] cat [−0.069,+0.056]; position steer [−0.081,+0.025] cat [−0.050,+0.100]; style steer [−0.038,+0.069] cat [+0.000,+0.169]. Style's category delta — the sole registered flag — has a bootstrap lower bound of EXACTLY 0.000: it touches the control noise floor and does not reliably exceed it. As pre-registered (recovery entry), at N=80×2 the 5pp threshold sits at/below the instrument's own category SE (3.7pp), so the registered rule flags an effect the CI cannot separate from test-retest noise. No goalpost move: (a) is the registered verdict; (b) is the caveat.

CATEGORY-LEVEL CONCENTRATIONS (steering-flip by original category):
  style flips concentrate in surface-wording-sensitive categories: new_task 0.21, wrong_approach 0.19, question 0.17, style_violation/premature/unwanted_action 0.10. direction (n=18, largest stratum) = 0.00 across ALL THREE factors — the clearest steering category is perturbation-robust.
  length: other 0.20, operational_directive 0.14, unwanted_action 0.10. position: other 0.20, unwanted_action 0.20. "other" (n=5, catch-all) is the noisiest stratum across every factor (0.10–0.20) — small + inherently ambiguous.

E19 RECOMMENDATION: incorporate STYLE (paraphrase-robustness) as the ONLY candidate factor, and only as LOW-PRIORITY/tentative — it is the sole registered flag but (i) category-granularity only, not the pipeline-consequential binary is_steering, and (ii) its bootstrap CI lower bound sits at the noise floor, so it is a weak, unconfirmed signal at this N. Do NOT incorporate length or position (both ≤ control). If E19 wants to confirm style before hardening, raise N/replicates rather than acting on the boundary flag; the churn is concentrated at the noise↔steering category boundary (new_task/wrong_approach/question), not in the robust steering core (direction).

SPEND (this lane): 6 passes, total_judge_in_chars=6,672,890 ≈ 1.67M sonnet input tok → ~$5.00 input (@$3/M) + ~$1.0–1.3 output (480 small structured Verdicts @$15/M) ≈ $6.0–6.3. Well under the $35 hard budget; all x2 replicates ran (no drop to x1). Cumulative E16 ≈ $8.9–9.2 (prior sunk ≈ $2.9). Artifacts attached: results.json, summary.txt (analyze.py, registered rule), ci_report.json, ci_report.txt (bootstrap-CI reading), vote_summary.json (per-pass in_chars).
